title: GRSL sensor-family validation code package
description: Curated review package for a GRSL letter quantifying how ISMN sensor-family composition changes apparent bias and RMSD of ERA5-Land, SMAP L3_E, and SMAP-SMI soil-moisture products. The package includes manuscript snapshots, figure files, small source-data CSVs, runnable summary plotting code, and legacy project scripts for provenance. Published record DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21263063.
